title: 3d27c1cc breaks wire assignment in a function
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

```verilog
module top(input in, output out);

function func;
  input arg;
  func = arg;
endfunction

assign out = func(in);

endmodule
```

```
yosys -q -p "synth_ice40 -blif demo.blif" demo.v
```

## Expected behavior

In Yosys 0.7, and commits before `3d27c1cc`, yosys completes the silently.

## Actual behavior

After `3d27c1cc` yosys outputs the following warning:

```
Warning: wire '$func$\func$demo.v:8$2$\arg' is assigned in a block at demo.v:4.
```
code_blocks: Warning: wire '$func$\func$demo.v:8$2$\arg' is assigned in a block at demo.v:4.
